sgTip: Prioritize NulBlaze and NulShock for Yuna — they trivialise the upcoming Sinspawn fights.

subLocations.name: S.S. Liki
subLocations.prose: Meet O'aka and donate toward the 1,001 Gil cumulative target for mid-tier discounts. The Potion suitcase on the main deck can be kicked multiple times for up to 20 Potions — worth doing. Primer III is in the Power Room at the back.

bosses.strategy: Sin's Fin appears on deck first. Focus attacks on it — no special mechanics. HP: 2,000.

Drain Touch is nasty — keep HP above 200. Have Yuna heal each round. Sin's Fin may return; deal with Echuilles first to end the fight. NulBlaze/NulShock from Yuna blocks the elemental damage. HP: 2,000.
